item.title: Ollama default URL hardcoded and inconsistent across 8+ files
item.intent: Ollama default URL has a single source of truth. No literal Ollama URL appears outside src/config/defaults.ts. All runtime references use the same host string.
item.description: The Ollama default URL is hardcoded across 8+ files with inconsistent values — some use http://127.0.0.1:11434 and others use http://localhost:11434, which are technically equivalent but create noise and risk drift. Locations: src/design/configure/ollama.ts:8 (127.0.0.1, named local const DEFAULT_OLLAMA_URL), src/evolve/memory/summarize.ts:54 (127.0.0.1), src/evolve/migrate/extract.ts:75 (127.0.0.1), src/evolve/provider/registry.ts:35 (localhost), src/evolve/integrate/validate.ts:94 (localhost), src/evolve/integrate/registry.ts:78 (localhost, string default). Same pattern as BUG-011 (Gateway port scattered across 12 files). Steps: (1) add OLLAMA_DEFAULT_URL = 'http://127.0.0.1:11434' to src/config/defaults.ts (use 127.0.0.1 to match the design/ module which is the primary Ollama caller); (2) replace all runtime string literals with the constant import; (3) update doc comments to match; (4) run tests. Scope: ~6 file edits, no logic change.
